posts.text: Company: Sacheerome Limited Sector: Speciality Chemical Exchange: NSE Emerge Basic Details • Market Cap: ₹700 crores • Issue Price: ₹102 • Current Price: ₹312 (as of 03.06.2026) • Listing Date: 16.06.2025 Financial Highlights Screenshot (17) 1784×792 72.3 KB Sacheerome has shown strong top-line acceleration over the last five financial years. Revenue grew from ₹64 Crores in Mar 2022 to ₹152 Crores in Mar 2026. This represents a robust 4-year Sales CAGR of approximately 24.15% .
